title: Kriminal
writer: Umberto Lenzi, David Moreno Mingote, Luciano Secchi
actors: Glenn Saxson, Helga Liné, Andrea Bosic
plot: A mastermind thief known as Kriminal narrowly escapes execution. He always manages to stay one step ahead of the law with each new crime he commits. Will Kriminal be able to pull of his biggest score yet or will a double cross lea...
